query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS host_interests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  district VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  contact VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  hidden BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS host_interests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  district VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  contact VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  hidden BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
